import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 256)
        )
        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(256, 4, batch_first=True)
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features
        B = visual.shape[0]
        visual = visual.reshape(B, 256, 1024)  # Ensure correct shape
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        
        # Process text features
        text = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 256]
        text = text.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.attention(visual, text, text)
        attended = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Combine features
        combined = torch.cat([visual.mean(dim=1), attended], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final projection
        output = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, 4]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 256)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 256)
        
        self.attention = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 1)
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to same dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Expand dimensions for attention computation
        visual_exp = visual_proj.unsqueeze(2)  # [B, 256, 1, 256]
        text_exp = text_proj.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 77, 256]
        
        # Compute attention scores
        combined = torch.cat([visual_exp.expand(-1,-1,77,-1), 
                             text_exp.expand(-1,256,-1,-1)], dim=-1)
        scores = self.attention(combined).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256, 77]
        attn_weights = F.softmax(scores, dim=-1)
        
        # Apply attention
        attended = torch.bmm(attn_weights, text_proj)  # [B, 256, 256]
        
        # Pool features
        visual_pool = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(visual_proj.transpose(1,2), 1).squeeze(-1)
        attended_pool = F.adaptive_avg_pool1d(attended.transpose(1,2), 1).squeeze(-1)
        
        # Concatenate and project
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pool, attended_pool], dim=1)
        output = self.fusion(fused)
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=4)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        visual_attn, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual_proj.transpose(0, 1),
            key=text_proj.transpose(0, 1),
            value=text_proj.transpose(0, 1)
        )
        visual_attn = visual_attn.transpose(0, 1)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        gate = self.gate(visual_attn)  # [B, 256, 512]
        gated_features = gate * visual_attn  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Pool and project to output
        pooled = torch.mean(gated_features, dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to same dimension
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            v_proj, t_proj, t_proj
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pool = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pool = t_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Feature gating
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pool, t_pool], dim=-1))
        fused = gate * v_pool + (1 - gate) * t_pool
        
        # Final projection
        out = self.fusion(fused)
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 256)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 256)
        
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 256))
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 256))
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Pooling
        visual_pool = self.visual_pool(visual).squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        text_pool = self.text_pool(text).squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pool, text_pool], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final projection
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual,
            key=text,
            value=text
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([visual, attn_out], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(combined)
        fused = gate * visual + (1 - gate) * attn_out
        
        # Pool and project to output
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256)
        )
        self.cross_attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(256, 4, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 256),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attention(
            query=text,
            key=visual,
            value=visual
        )
        
        # Average pooling over sequence dimension
        text_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Feature gating
        gate = self.gate(text_pooled)
        fused = gate * visual_pooled + (1 - gate) * text_pooled
        
        # Final projection
        out = self.final_proj(fused)
        return out

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 512)
        
        self.adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool text features
        text_pool = self.adaptive_pool(text_proj.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features
        visual_pool = self.adaptive_pool(visual_proj.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pool, text_pool], dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final projection
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 512)
        
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Pool both modalities [B, 256, 512] -> [B, 512]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual_proj.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        
        # [B, 77, 512] -> [B, 512]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(text_proj.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)
        
        # Concatenate pooled features [B, 1024]
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=1)
        
        # Final MLP [B, 4]
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        return output

import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        B = visual.shape[0]
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual.view(B, 256, 1024))  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text.view(B, 77, 768))  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Average pool features along sequence dimension
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pooled = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and final projection
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 512)
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common space
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(visual_proj)
        fused = gate * attended + (1 - gate) * visual_proj
        
        # Pool and predict
        pooled = torch.mean(fused, dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.fusion(pooled)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.adaptive_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual,
            key=text,
            value=text
        )
        
        # Adaptive gating
        gate = self.adaptive_gate(attended)  # [B, 256, 1]
        fused = gate * visual + (1 - gate) * attended
        
        # Pool and project
        pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.final_proj(pooled)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.cross_attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to same dimension
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attention(
            query=visual_proj,
            key=text_proj,
            value=text_proj
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([visual_proj, attended], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate(combined)
        fused = gate * visual_proj + (1 - gate) * attended
        
        # Pool and predict
        pooled = torch.mean(fused, dim=1)
        output = self.fusion_mlp(pooled)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024]
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual.permute(0, 2, 1))  # [B, 1024, 128]
        visual = self.adaptive_pool(visual.permute(0, 2, 1))  # [B, 128, 1]
        visual = visual.squeeze(-1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 128]
        text = self.adaptive_pool(text.permute(0, 2, 1))  # [B, 128, 1]
        text = text.squeeze(-1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=1)
        output = self.fusion(combined)
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv1d(256, 128, 1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Conv1d(128, 64, 1)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 64)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(64, 4, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(64, 64),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(64, 32),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(32, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        visual = visual.permute(0, 2, 1)   # [B, 1024, 64]
        
        # Process text features
        text = self.text_proj(text)        # [B, 77, 64]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(visual, text, text)
        
        # Feature gating
        gate = self.gate(attended.mean(1))
        fused = attended.mean(1) * gate
        
        # Final projection
        out = self.final_mlp(fused)
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 128)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(512, 128)
        )
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 128]
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)
        visual = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 128]
        text = self.text_proj(text)
        text = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 128]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=-1)  # [B, 256]
        output = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 4]
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 256)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 256)
        
        self.attention = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 1),
            nn.Softmax(dim=1)
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project inputs
        visual_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Average text features
        text_avg = torch.mean(text_proj, dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 256]
        
        # Attention weights
        attn_weights = self.attention(visual_proj)  # [B, 256, 1]
        
        # Weighted visual features
        attended_visual = visual_proj * attn_weights  # [B, 256, 256]
        attended_visual = torch.sum(attended_visual, dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Combine features
        combined = attended_visual + text_avg.squeeze(1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, 4]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512)
        )
        
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(512, 8, batch_first=True)
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.final_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attended_visual, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=visual,
            key=text,
            value=text
        )
        
        # Global average pooling
        visual_pool = attended_visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pool = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Feature gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_pool, text_pool], dim=1)
        gate = self.gate(combined)
        gated_features = gate * visual_pool + (1 - gate) * text_pool
        
        # Final projection
        output = self.final_proj(gated_features)
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):  # Make input_dims optional
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(1024, 256)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(768, 256)
        
        self.attention = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 1)
        )
        
        self.mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Project both modalities
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 256]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 256]
        
        # Pool text features
        text_pool = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Expand text features for attention
        text_exp = text_pool.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 256, -1)  # [B, 256, 256]
        
        # Concatenate features for attention
        concat = torch.cat([visual, text_exp], dim=-1)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Compute attention weights
        attn_weights = F.softmax(self.attention(concat), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        
        # Apply attention
        visual_attn = (visual * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([visual_attn, text_pool], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final projection
        output = self.mlp(fused)
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 256),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 256),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024]
        visual = visual.mean(dim=1)
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768]
        text = text.mean(dim=1)
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        return self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 4]

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 256),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 256),
            nn.ReLU()
        )
        
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 4)
        )

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024]
        visual = visual.mean(dim=1)
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768]
        text = text.mean(dim=1)
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        return self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 4]
